_comment: ISIN-continuity renames/drops not reflected in nse-universe rank file (nse-universe ingests EQ series only and does not track name changes / EQ->BE surveillance moves / delistings). Applied in fortress/universe.py when as_of >= effective: 'to' rewrites the ticker, 'to': null drops it (untradeable on Kite NSE EQ). Verify entries against the latest NSE bhavcopy (raw zips under data/raw/, regenerable via the Universe Update pipeline) by ISIN. EQ->BE (Trade-to-Trade) names are NOT in the Kite NSE EQ instruments dump, so they must be dropped or they raise 'Unknown symbol' on cache update. After adding/removing entries, optionally rerun tools/build_sectors.py so any new ticker inherits a sector classification.

E2E.note: Moved EQ -> BE (Trade-to-Trade); not in Kite NSE EQ instruments dump

CIGNITITEC.note: Cigniti Technologies delisted - ISIN absent from NSE bhavcopy after last EQ trade 2026-05-14

STLTECH.note: Sterlite Technologies moved EQ -> BE (Trade-to-Trade) 2026-05-14; not in Kite NSE EQ dump. Defensive: also dropped from [201,600] by June rank once BE killed turnover

DBREALTY.note: D B Realty -> Valor Estate Ltd, also moved EQ -> BE (Trade-to-Trade) 2026-05-19; not in Kite NSE EQ dump

IDEAFORGE.note: ideaForge Technology moved EQ -> BE (Trade-to-Trade) 2026-05-19; not in Kite NSE EQ dump

JAIBALAJI.note: Jai Balaji Industries moved EQ -> BE (Trade-to-Trade) 2026-05-19; not in Kite NSE EQ dump

KRN.note: KRN Heat Exchanger & Refrigeration moved EQ -> BE (Trade-to-Trade) 2026-05-19; not in Kite NSE EQ dump

QPOWER.note: Quality Power Electrical Equipment moved EQ -> BE (Trade-to-Trade) 2026-05-19; not in Kite NSE EQ dump

STYLEBAAZA.note: Baazar Style Retail moved EQ -> BE (Trade-to-Trade) 2026-05-19; not in Kite NSE EQ dump
